prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The Hollywood Critics Association presented the 1st Hollywood Critics Association Creative Arts Awards on February 24, 2023. The winners were announced on the official HCA Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter, and the 6th Hollywood Critics Association Film Awards were held on December 8, 2022, and announced on the HCA official YouTube channel and app.
B. The 1st Hollywood Critics Association Creative Arts Awards, presented by the Hollywood Critics Association, took place on February 24, 2023. The winners were announced on the official HCA Facebook, Instagram and Twitter, while the 6th Hollywood Critics Association Film Awards took place on the same day at the Beverly Wilshire Hotel, Beverly Hills. The nominations were announced on the HCA official YouTube channel and app on December 8, 2022.Everything Everywhere All at Once led the nominations with six, followed by The Batman and Top Gun: Maverick with five each. The former and Babylon won the most awards with two wins each.A shortlist committee, led by Erik Anderson, AwardsWatch contributor and HCA member, was created and tasked with generating twelve category shortlists for the HCA Creative Arts Awards. Six
C. The Hollywood Critics Association held its inaugural Creative Arts Awards ceremony on February 24, 2023. The names of the honorees were disseminated via the HCA's official platforms on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter. Concurrently, on the very same date, the 6th iteration of the Hollywood Critics Association Film Awards transpired at the esteemed Beverly Wilshire Hotel, situated in Beverly Hills. The roster of nominees had been previously unveiled on December 8, 2022, through the HCA's official YouTube channel and its dedicated application. The film "Everything Everywhere All at Once" garnered the highest number of nominations, receiving six nods. Closely trailing were "The Batman" and "Top Gun: Maverick," both of which secured five nominations apiece. Notably, "Everything Everywhere All at Once" and "Babylon" emerged as the most distinguished films, each accumulating two awards. A specialized committee, responsible for compiling preliminary selections, was established for the HCA Creative Arts Awards. This committee, under the guidance of Erik Anderson, a contributor to AwardsWatch and a member of the HCA, was assigned the duty of formulating twelve distinct category shortlists. Six

Answer:
